examples: Of course Dr. Craven had been sent for the morning after Colin had had his tantrum.
He immediately threw a tantrum, screaming and stomping up and down like a child.
"I may be obliged to have a tantrum," said Colin regretfully.
As I say to my children whenever they throw a temper tantrum: tough noogies.
Gradually, ask the child to delete certain unwanted behaviors from the tantrum, like kicking or screaming.
